# Mosaic Hostel Varanasi

Mosaic Hostel is a premium budget hostel located near Assi Ghat in Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh, India. Established in 2025, we welcome solo travelers, groups, backpackers, and families seeking authentic experiences in one of the world's oldest cities.

## Location & Contact

**Address:** B1/85C, Assi Ghat Road, Anandbagh, Varanasi, Uttar Pradesh 221005, India  
**Phone:** +91-9125492225  
**Email:** mosaichostels@gmail.com  
**Website:** https://www.mosaichostels.com

## Pages

- **Homepage** (https://www.mosaichostels.com/) — Overview of Mosaic Hostel, room types, amenities, and booking
- **About Us** (https://www.mosaichostels.com/about) — Our story, philosophy, and team  
- **Photo Gallery** (https://www.mosaichostels.com/gallery) — Property photos and room images
- **Blog** (https://www.mosaichostels.com/blog) — Travel guides for Varanasi and Assi Ghat
- **Book Now** (https://www.mosaichostels.com/book-now) — Direct booking and room availability
- **Contact** (https://www.mosaichostels.com/contact) — Contact form and location map
- **Privacy Policy** (https://www.mosaichostels.com/privacy) — Data privacy information

## Room Types

- **Dorm Rooms** — 6-bed mixed, 6-bed female-only, 4-bed female-only. Rates from ₹499 per night
- **Private Rooms** — Single, double, and triple occupancy with AC and ensuite bathrooms

## Amenities

Free high-speed WiFi, air conditioning, hot water, secure lockers, shared kitchen, rooftop terrace, 24-hour front desk, laundry service, yoga classes

- **Best Hostels in Varanasi — 2025 Honest Guide** (https://www.mosaichostels.com/blog/best-hostels-in-varanasi) — Neighbourhood breakdown and hostel comparison

- **Backpackers' Guide to Assi Ghat, Varanasi** (https://www.mosaichostels.com/blog/backpackers-guide-assi-ghat-varanasi) — Practical tips, activities, and local recommendations
- **Top 7 Experiences for a Traveler in Varanasi** (https://www.mosaichostels.com/blog/top-7-experiences-varanasi-traveler) — Must-do activities and authentic experiences

All pages are accessible via www.mosaichostels.com with extensionless URLs (e.g., /about, not /about.html or non-www variants). The canonical version is https://www.mosaichostels.com
